---
title: "Examples"
subtitle: "Rendered plots with the source code available for each."
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
body-classes: examples-page
engine: markdown
listing:
  - id: gallery
    template: ../assets/templates/_example-gallery.ejs.md
    contents: gallery.yml
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    feed: false
    page-size: 200
---

Every example below lives in the [`examples/`](https://github.com/mcanouil/gribouille/tree/main/examples) directory of the repository.
Click any example to view its source.

::: {#gallery}
:::
